description: This pipeline processes image data by first visualizing spots and then using the output to visualize tracks, ultimately producing a visualization of the processed data as its final output, allowing for the analysis and display of image features in a structured and interpretable format.

df5227e6-3b64-4b39-9c14-72278078aaa6.name: trackmate-visualize-tracks
df5227e6-3b64-4b39-9c14-72278078aaa6.description:
Visualizes tracks

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

c2f77656-f722-44ab-95b2-64012cbf0d28.name: trackmate-visualize-spots
c2f77656-f722-44ab-95b2-64012cbf0d28.description:
Visualizes spots

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
